title: Providing evidence and documents to support your visa application :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Providing evidence and documents to support your visa application
Find out about the evidence and documents you might need to send us to support your visa application.
- Providing English translations of supporting documents Check the requirements of the visa you are applying for. Provide translations of your documents to avoid delays processing your application.

## Providing English translations of supporting documents
Check the requirements of the visa you are applying for. Provide translations of your documents to avoid delays processing your application.
- Health requirements If you are applying for a New Zealand visa you may need to provide us with information to show you have an acceptable standard of health.
If you are applying for a New Zealand visa you may need to provide us with information to show you have an acceptable standard of health.
- Genuine intentions to visit or work in New Zealand Before you can get a visa or enter New Zealand to visit or work we check that your reasons for coming here are genuine.

## Genuine intentions to visit or work in New Zealand
Before you can get a visa or enter New Zealand to visit or work we check that your reasons for coming here are genuine.
- Genuine intentions to study in New Zealand Before you can get a visa or come to New Zealand to study, we check that your reasons for coming here are genuine.

## Genuine intentions to study in New Zealand
Before you can get a visa or come to New Zealand to study, we check that your reasons for coming here are genuine.
- Good character requirements and police certificates To get a visa, you must meet good character requirements. This includes providing us with correct and complete information. To prove your good character you may need to provide us with police certificates.

## Good character requirements and police certificates
To get a visa, you must meet good character requirements. This includes providing us with correct and complete information. To prove your good character you may need to provide us with police certificates.
- Acceptable investments for investor and retirement visas If you are applying for an investor visa or a parent retirement visa you must show your investments are acceptable.

## Acceptable investments for investor and retirement visas
If you are applying for an investor visa or a parent retirement visa you must show your investments are acceptable.
- English language requirements For some visas you need to be able to speak and understand English. Find out how to meet the English language requirement for different visas.

## English language requirements
For some visas you need to be able to speak and understand English. Find out how to meet the English language requirement for different visas.
- Student fund requirements How much money you need if you are applying for a student visa, what you need it for, different funding options, and the types of evidence we can accept.

## Student fund requirements
How much money you need if you are applying for a student visa, what you need it for, different funding options, and the types of evidence we can accept.
- Identity information We use biometric information and information matching to verify your identity and your right to New Zealand government services.

## Identity information
We use biometric information and information matching to verify your identity and your right to New Zealand government services.
- Giving false or misleading information in your application Information for visa applicants and their agents about what happens if we are provided with false information and how it affects future applications.

## Giving false or misleading information in your application
Information for visa applicants and their agents about what happens if we are provided with false information and how it affects future applications.
- Visitor Visa application guide for citizens of China This application guide is for citizens of China applying from Mainland China, Hong Kong or Macau to easily plan and organise your trip to New Zealand.

## Visitor Visa application guide for citizens of China
This application guide is for citizens of China applying from Mainland China, Hong Kong or Macau to easily plan and organise your trip to New Zealand.
